light.title: Light Weapons
light.text:
All Light Weapons have the Weightless property.

• You can make one additional attack as a free action each turn.
• If you strike an enemy who is not expecting it, such as from stealth, distraction, or surprise, the attack deals an extra 2d6 damage.

Weapon options:
• Dagger
• Pistols
• Fist
• Rapiers

medium.title: Medium Weapons
medium.text:
All Medium Weapons have the Versatile property.

One-Handed:
• You gain one extra attack as a free action as long as you have already attacked.

Two-Handed:
• The number required to score a critical hit is reduced to 18.

You can change between one-handed and two-handed at the start of your turn or right before making an attack.

Weapon options:
• Swords
• Spears
• Clubs
• Rifles
• Twinblades
• Bows

heavy.title: Heavy Weapons
heavy.text:
All Heavy Weapons have the Mammoth property.

• You sacrifice all attacks in a turn to perform one massive strike.
• When using Mammoth, you need 3 less to hit, effectively lowering the target's AC by 3 for that attack.
• If you crit, the damage is tripled.

Weapon options:
• Greataxe
• Greatsword
• Greathammers
• Greatcannons
